name: open-academic-paper-machine
description: Open Academic Paper Machine — Autonomous academic paper production system. Uses MCP academic-search tools (Semantic Scholar, OpenAlex, CrossRef, arXiv) for literature search, snowballing, and export. PaperBanana MCP for figure generation. Theory framing, methodology, and writing engine with fill-in-the-blank templates. One command (/write-paper) triggers the full 6-phase pipeline from topic to complete first draft with LaTeX and PDF output. /export-latex for standalone LaTeX export using arxiv-style.

args: if [ -f "$PWD/.env" ]; then set -a; . "$PWD/.env"; set +a; fi; exec paperbanana-mcp
